REFERENCE for AI generation: 5-star Google badge. Appears only when google_review_count ≥ 30 (HR08, HR19).
REFERENCE: Google Reviews 5.0 with stars (text variant). Same gating as primary.
REFERENCE: Google Reviews + hand pointing (illustrated variant).
REFERENCE: Google My Business badge variant.
REFERENCE: Generic 5-star (no Google branding).

REFERENCE for AI generation: FAMILY OWNED & OPERATED badge — circular blue/cream/gold seal with house icon containing family silhouette + heart. Generate when client.family_owned === true (per HR19). Image-gen prompt for ChatGPT Image 2: "A clean modern circular badge with house icon and stylised family (parents + child) silhouette and red heart inside the house, navy blue circle with cream/gold border, FAMILY OWNED curved across top arc, & OPERATED across bottom arc, transparent background, suitable for compositing." GUIDANCE: This image is a STYLE REFERENCE, not a locked asset. ChatGPT Image 2 should (a) embed the reference badge as-is if it composites cleanly into the ad design, OR (b) generate a fresh badge in the same visual style (navy/cream/gold circular seal, matching iconography and lettering) if the reference would clash with the ad's palette, background, or layout. Quality of fit takes priority over literal reuse — never embed if it would look out of place.

REFERENCE for AI generation: FAMILY OWNED & OPERATED badge — same design as trust_family_owned but with a soft yellow/gold glow halo around the seal. Use as alternative reference when ad mood calls for warmer/brighter feel. Same gating per HR19 (client.family_owned === true). GUIDANCE: This image is a STYLE REFERENCE, not a locked asset. ChatGPT Image 2 should (a) embed the reference badge as-is if it composites cleanly into the ad design, OR (b) generate a fresh badge in the same visual style (navy/cream/gold circular seal, matching iconography and lettering) if the reference would clash with the ad's palette, background, or layout. Quality of fit takes priority over literal reuse — never embed if it would look out of place.

REFERENCE for AI generation: AUSTRALIAN OWNED badge — circular blue/cream/gold seal with Australia map silhouette. Generate when client.australian_owned === true (per HR19). Image-gen prompt for ChatGPT Image 2: "A clean modern circular badge with Australia silhouette in centre, navy blue circle with cream/gold border, AUSTRALIAN curved across top arc, OWNED across bottom arc, subtle gold accent dots at sides, transparent background, suitable for compositing onto ad." GUIDANCE: This image is a STYLE REFERENCE, not a locked asset. ChatGPT Image 2 should (a) embed the reference badge as-is if it composites cleanly into the ad design, OR (b) generate a fresh badge in the same visual style (navy/cream/gold circular seal, matching iconography and lettering) if the reference would clash with the ad's palette, background, or layout. Quality of fit takes priority over literal reuse — never embed if it would look out of place.

Use as alternative reference when ad mood calls for warmer/brighter feel. Same gating per HR19 (client.australian_owned === true). GUIDANCE: This image is a STYLE REFERENCE, not a locked asset. Middle-aged man in plaid shirt holding bill, hand on head, mildly concerned — bright airy background.
Man in navy polo on couch holding paper, hand on forehead — classic concerned-bill pose, alt setting.
Man in blue shirt holding two bills with laptop nearby — comparing/confused look, modern home office.
Middle-aged woman in striped blouse at kitchen table, hand on forehead, looking at bill — laptop & calculator nearby.
Woman in yellow sweater, hand over mouth — shocked/dismayed reaction to bill, brick wall behind.
Mature woman in striped sweater at sunlit kitchen table reviewing paper, calm/contemplative.
Open brown leather wallet on weathered wood, dramatic light beam from above + scattered coins & receipt — moody / pain palette.
Open brown wallet on rustic table with golden side-light + coins falling out — warm dramatic mood.
Modern black leather wallet on dark concrete with scattered coins — contemporary minimalist take.
Teal piggy bank + simple downward arrow on purple — bright illustrated style, optimistic 'bills going down' vibe.
Pink 3D piggy bank with bandage + red downward arrow — mixed mood, illustrative.
Australian $50 note + chalkboard crash chart (red downward arrow) — pain/decline mood for problem ads.
Australian $10 note + chalkboard crash chart (red downward arrow) — pain/decline mood variant.
Utility bill summary with diagonal red OVERDUE stamp + red highlight bar — clean, real-looking bill (primary).
Utility bill with red OVERDUE stamp + calculator on patterned tablecloth — implies the math stress.
Person holding utility bills with red OVERDUE stamp visible — broader scene, real-looking.

Young woman with thumbs up, smiling, white t-shirt — positive reaction.
Christmas warm bokeh fairy lights with pine branches, dark navy negative space — primary backdrop.
Christmas scene — Christmas tree + fireplace + wooden table foreground, warm cozy.
Snow-flocked Christmas trees on right + red & gold bokeh — festive, left-side overlay space.
Real fireworks photo — multiple gold/red bursts against starry night sky. Atmospheric & authentic.
Illustration-style fireworks at top of frame, gradient dark sky — large negative space below for overlay.
Single golden firework burst on near-black sky — dramatic, max dark negative space.
Illustration fireworks in blue palette on deep navy sky — distinct cool palette variant.
Pastel atmospheric — soft blue-green bokeh, white spring flowers + accent eggs along bottom, large negative space.
Watercolor abstract — pastel sky-blue + watercolor green grass, very minimal, no eggs.
Pink minimalist — soft pink background, baby's-breath flowers on right, max overlay space on left.
Wooden round platform + scattered eggs in grass + cherry blossoms — clean composition with sky.
Eggs on wooden table + cherry blossoms + blue sky — wider product-stage scene.
Empty Australian beach — clean sand foreground, turquoise ocean, sky with clouds. No people.
Christmas tree with presents on Australian beach — Aussie summer Christmas vibe, no people.
Santa relaxing on beach chair on white sand — themed atmospheric, single small figure mid-frame.
Christmas tree on beach with sunset / golden hour — warm Aussie summer Christmas variant.
Dark abstract with red wave/streak — dramatic dark with red accent + lots of negative space.
Abstract red + black paper panels — split-color minimalist backdrop.
Red-to-black gradient — minimalist colour wash, lots of overlay space.
Black silk/fabric texture — pure black moody backdrop, no red accent.
Australian flag on dune above beach with native bushland — clean photo, generic Aussie outdoor.
Kangaroo holding Australian flag at sunset over beach — bold themed variant (AI-generated stock).
Sky + green grass horizon — atmospheric backdrop, plenty of negative space.
Sky + grass horizon — bright variant 2 with central cloud and clean perspective.
Sky + grass with softer foreground gradient — bright airy variant.
Australian suburban street with home in foreground.
Single Australian suburban brick home with green lawn + blue sky — single-house variant.
Australian residential home exterior — weatherboard / Hampton's-style cottage shot, daylight.
Australian heatwave sunset atmospheric.
Dramatic red-orange sunset over mountains with sun rays — intense heat dramatic sky.
Large glowing sun in red-orange cloudy sky close-up — pure heatwave sky negative space.
Cracked red earth + eucalyptus trees in Aussie outback — drought/heat ground variant.
Desert sand dunes + bare tree at sunset — minimalist heat/desert mood.
